# OpenPrep

OpenPrep is a free, open-source (MIT) desktop app for TOEFL® Writing practice.

## What is OpenPrep?

OpenPrep is a local-first macOS application that gives TOEFL® learners structured writing practice and AI-powered feedback. Users pick a TOEFL®-style writing prompt, write their response in a focused desktop workspace, and submit it for evaluation.

## How much does OpenPrep cost?

OpenPrep is completely free and open source under the MIT license. There is no subscription, no usage limit, and no hidden cost.

## What AI tools does OpenPrep support?

OpenPrep connects to AI tools the user already has installed, including ChatGPT via Codex, Claude Code, OpenCode, and local Ollama models.

## What feedback does OpenPrep provide?

The app returns structured feedback: an overall TOEFL® score, CEFR level, criterion-based subscores, improvement points, and phrase-level recommendations with highlighted suggestions.

## Who is OpenPrep for?

Learners who already use AI tools and want focused, free TOEFL® Writing practice without paying for a full exam-prep platform.

## Where can I download OpenPrep?

https://github.com/MauriceHeinze/open-prep/releases

## License
